name: VeloWalletPayout
description: Records of fund withdrawals and payouts from platforms to the user.

owner_user_id.description: User ID of the wallet owner

destination_label.description: Safe label for destination (e.g., 'PayPal Personal', 'Chase Bank') - NO RAW ACCOUNT NUMBERS

external_transaction_id.description: Reference ID from the external platform

linked_transaction_ids.description: IDs of VeloWalletTransactions included in this payout
